title: Antim: The Final Truth
subTitle: Rahul runs away from his poverty-stricken village life to become a gangster in the city. There, he locks horns with an upstanding policeman who tries to set him on the right path.

title: Action Rowdy
subTitle: Anna rules over Rayalaseema with a good heart. However, when a project threatens the well-being of his people, he does everything he can to oppose it and angers dangerous people as a result.

title: Zero
subTitle: A vertically-challenged bachelor with a larger-than-life personality discovers his life's purpose through his relationships with two wildly different women.

title: Rog
subTitle: A troubled police officer falls in love with a dead woman while investigating her murder. Soon, he gets trapped in a situation that leads to further conflicts.

title: Bro
subTitle: An arrogant young man meets his end in a fatal car accident and meets the god of time. While the god grants him three months to set his life in order, the man realises the error of his previous ways.

title: Jai Simha
subTitle: Narasimha, a fiery but kind-hearted mechanic, becomes the guardian of an innocent family. Subsequently, he ends up taking on the ruthless kingpin Kariappan and his violent gang to protect them.

title: Kick
subTitle: Devi, a man who cannot stay put as he is addicted to going on new adventures, breaks up with his girlfriend, Shaina, who is a Warsaw-based psychiatrist, just to pursue his daredevil ambitions.

title: Baby John
subTitle: An indomitable policeman goes to greater lengths and leads a double life in order to protect his daughter from the criminal underworld.

title: Mission Raniganj
subTitle: Mission Raniganj - 2023 - Mining engineer Jaswant Singh Gill leads a challenging rescue mission to save 65 miners trapped in a flooded coal mine.

title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
subTitle: Pawan Chaturvedi rises above the divisive bounds of nationality and religion to help a little Pakistani girl stranded in India.

title: Khiladi
subTitle: Pooja, a criminologist, along with Arjun, a CBI official, tries to solve two interlinked cases of murder and money laundering. As they investigate the crimes, the conspiracy intensifies.

title: Khiladi
subTitle: Pooja, a criminologist, along with Arjun, a CBI official, tries to solve two interlinked cases of murder and money laundering. As they investigate the crimes, the conspiracy intensifies.

title: Guna 369
subTitle: The life of Guna, a happy-go-lucky man, turns upside down when he is falsely framed for a murder and imprisoned. After his release, he sets off to hunt the real culprits and expose their crimes.

title: Ghost
subTitle: When an inexperienced lawyer chooses to defend a young politician who is accused of murdering his wife, a spirit begins to pursue her.

title: Ka Pae Ranasingam
subTitle: Ariyanachi, a poor woman, strives to bring her deceased husband's body back to India from Dubai, battling the odds of political agenda, corruption and a treacherous bureaucracy that stand in her way.

title: Daring Rakhwala
subTitle: An intoxicated dog bites a security guard, unleashes a zombie outbreak. A traffic officer takes up the responsibility to find the antidote.

title: Encounter Shankar
subTitle: Post his transfer to a village, an encounter specialist sets out to stop a crime boss who wants to build a power plant in the region despite strong public opposition.

title: Real Tevar
subTitle: Harsha is the idealistic scion of a self-made multimillionaire, Ravikanth. After a chance meeting with Charuseela leads him to a remote village, Harsha wishes to develop it with her help.

title: Geetha Govindam
subTitle: Vijay Govind, a young lecturer in a college, wishes to get married at the earliest. He tries to woo Geetha, an independent and a level-headed woman, who is not easy to convince.

title: A Flying Jatt
subTitle: Donning a mighty cape and a heart of gold, a quirky Punjabi superhero whooshes through low-altitude escapades and fights the humongous villain who threatens the world.

title: Hum Aapke Hain Kaun
subTitle: A man and a woman fall in love, but fate intervenes when she has to marry his older brother for the good of their families.

title: Bholaa
subTitle: After getting out of prison with the desire to meet his daughter, Bholaa's plans are interrupted by a well-orchestrated drug bust.

title: Bholaa
subTitle: After getting out of prison with the desire to meet his daughter, Bholaa's plans are interrupted by a well-orchestrated drug bust.

title: Mahaveer No.1
subTitle: A young orphan, White, challenges the sly Adikesavalu for control of the Ongole market and his daughter. Their fight unearths a past of greed, injustice and a simmering quest for revenge.

title: Daring Baaz
subTitle: Goutham resolves to reunite his grandfather with Sunanda, his estranged aunt. However, he chooses to pose as a driver to befriend her.

title: Dhartiputra
subTitle: Yashpal tries to rape Jeeva and her husband, Shiva, stops him while she manages to escape. However, Yashpal kills him and she vows to avenge his death.

title: Tees Maar Khan
subTitle: Having escaped from abusive households, Tees Maar Khan and Vasudha form a familial bond. Years later, a tragedy involving the mafia leaves Tees Maar Khan vying for revenge.

title: Aranmanai 4
subTitle: Suspicious about his sister's death, Saravanan, a lawyer, tries to solve the mystery behind it, only to discover a mysteriously dark force at play.

title: Gadar 2
subTitle: Upon learning about his father's disappearance at the border, Jeete believes that his father is captured and sets out to rescue him in Pakistan.

title: K3 - Kaali Ka Karishma
subTitle: A young man, who lives happily with his family but is scared of ghosts, visits Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, with his family. There, he is soon possessed by a vengeful ghost with a sinister past.

title: Pushpa 2: The Rule
subTitle: Pushpa The Rule Part-02 - 2024 - A smuggling kingpin faces off against a vengeful rival while manipulating politics, making big deals, and navigating tense confrontations. A public apology leads to a dramatic showdown, ending with challenge.

title: Pralay the Destroyer
subTitle: Some thugs annihilate an entire family and flee the scene without facing any consequences. Years later, the universe balances the scales of justice through the sole survivor of the tragedy.
